gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 在错位的语音留言中，听见了最真挚的孤独与爱。
gems.whyWatchEn: A heartfelt comedy-romance where a wrong number becomes a lifeline of love and grief.
gems.audience: 喜欢《真心半解》《西雅图夜未眠》式浪漫与治愈的观众
gems.audienceEn: Fans of heartfelt, character-driven romantic comedies like 'The Half of It' or 'Sleepless in Seattle'.
